# scripts/scaffold_insurance_depts.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T10:00:06Z

## Purpose
Insurance departments scaffolder (project-local, MDD per global §59).

Generates the full §64 + §66 artifact set for 4 insurance departments:
  - claims
  - underwriting
  - customer-service
  - fraud-siu

Plus three new artifact types per operator 2026-06-01:
  - INSUR_PROCESS_FLOW.md     — Mermaid swimlane / flowchart per L2 process
  - INSUR_ARCHITECTURE_FLOW.md — Mermaid C4 L2 architecture per dept
  - INSUR_BUSINESS_MODELS.md  — B2C / B2B / B2E process flows per dept

Source-of-truth: a single INSURANCE_DEPTS dict (this file). Edit dict →
re-run → all 50+ files regenerate. Idempotent.

Usage: python3 scripts/scaffold_insurance_depts.py

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import sys
- from `_` import textwrap
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `datetime` import datetime, timezone

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `w(path, content)`: (no docstring)
- `md_table(headers, rows)`: Render a markdown table from headers + rows.
- `render_dept_readme(slug, d)`: (no docstring)
- `render_demo_story(slug, d)`: (no docstring)
- `render_asis(slug, d)`: (no docstring)
- `render_dt_strategy(slug, d)`: (no docstring)
- `render_process_flow(slug, d)`: Mermaid swimlane / flowchart per L2 process. Per operator 2026-06-01.
- `render_architecture_flow(slug, d)`: Mermaid C4 L2 architecture per dept. Per operator 2026-06-01.
- `render_business_models(slug, d)`: B2C / B2B / B2E (+ B2G if present) flows per dept. Per operator 2026-06-01.
- `render_data_mgmt(slug, d)`: (no docstring)
- `render_use_cases(slug, d)`: Top 10 use cases per dept extracted from process_hierarchy + ai_matrix.
- `render_incident_mgmt(slug, d)`: (no docstring)
- `render_dept_spec(slug, d)`: (no docstring)
- `render_ai_agents(slug, d)`: (no docstring)
- `render_kpis(slug, d)`: (no docstring)

- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above
